rag_rules: Fix unresolved references in AGREE contracts by ensuring all identifiers are visible in the current scope or properly declared as helpers.
When AGREE reports 'named thing must be an expression with a type', resolve the first invalid identifier or helper declaration on the same line.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must reference only visible AADL features or helpers declared in the same annex.
AGREE scalar type declarations must use int, real, or bool; avoid package-qualified or undefined types.
When a guarantee expression has type <error>, trace and fix the root cause of the unresolved reference.
Minimize repairs to only the diagnostics reported by the validator; avoid introducing unrelated changes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type annexes are for assumptions and guarantees; implementation annexes are for bindings.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or types not present in the model's configured dependencies.
Do not add architecture elements to resolve AGREE diagnostics unless the root cause is fixed.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about property associations
AGREE validator diagnostics about component type contracts
